body.label: topology_9.root.thm
body.claim: For X = \mathbb{Z}_{\ge 1} with the topology generated by the basis \mathcal{B}=\{B_n\mid n\in X\}, where B_n=\{k\cdot n\mid k\in\mathbb{Z}_{\ge 1}\}, for every m\in X, \overline{\{m\}}=\{d\in X\mid d \text{ divides } m\}.

proof_steps.claim: For X = \mathbb{Z}_{\ge 1} with the topology generated by the basis \mathcal{B}=\{B_n\mid n\in X\}, where B_n=\{k\cdot n\mid k\in\mathbb{Z}_{\ge 1}\}, for every m\in X, \overline{\{m\}}=\{d\in X\mid d \text{ divides } m\}.
